page: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCASv5 family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external Premium Storage options, which the instance is capable of supporting. There are no integrated GPUs on this server, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC96as_v5 offers high resource density with dedicated CPU allocation, making it suitable for enterprise workloads that require predictable CPU performance without the overhead of GPU hardware. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions it for general-purpose enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and database workloads that utilize external storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v5 is a general-purpose server instance from the DCASv5 family, featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD x86_64 architecture. Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU ratio. This configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, though it is fully capable of utilizing external Premium Storage. Without complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network architecture must be configured externally. The high core count and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance suitable for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and database deployments relying on network-attached storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v5 is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for enterprise workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC96as_v5 is an x86_64 general-purpose server with 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A dedicated 96-vCPU AMD processor instance with a balanced memory profile, designed for enterprise workloads utilizing external premium storage.

384.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage bundled
